name: 4-bit ALU
description: A registered 4-bit ALU (add/sub/mul/div/and/or/xor/not/encrypt), adapted from a Tiny Tapeout Apache-2.0 project, taken spec -> lint -> simulation -> GDS on sky130hd entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met: WNS 0.0 ns; 237 std cells; 1974 um2
Self-checking TB: all 9 opcodes x 256 operand pairs (2304 vectors) PASSED
Interactive: open alu4.dashboard.html — a working calculator panel on the real netlist
source_note: RTL adapted from Tiny Tapeout Richard28277/4bit_alu (Apache-2.0, commit fa22976); original self-checking TB; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally (native iverilog sim + local ORFS synth).
